from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from datetime import datetime, date
import pyspark.sql.functions as F

table_name: str = "odw_curated_db.appeal_has_curated_mipins"
start_exec_time = datetime.now()
insert_count = 0
update_count = 0
delete_count = 0
error_message=''
end_exec_time=''

PipelineName = "pln_curated_mipins"
PipelineRunID = "097e997a-70d4-4188-90c8-09b9c7445c8e"
PipelineTriggerID = "e72971fa-9f51-4683-98c0-d7d93425023f"
PipelineTriggerName = "e72971fa-9f51-4683-98c0-d7d93425023f"
PipelineTriggerType = "PipelineActivity"
PipelineTriggeredbyPipelineName = "pln_master"
PipelineTriggeredbyPipelineRunID = "688cd58a-1365-4e39-8d5e-dd39745c15c5"

try:
    view_df=spark.sql("""
        SELECT DISTINCT
            CAST(AH.caseId AS INT)                      AS caseId,
            AH.caseReference                            AS caseReference,
            AH.submissionId                             AS submissionId,
            AH.caseStatus                               AS caseStatus,
            AH.caseType                                 AS caseType,
            AH.caseProcedure                            AS caseProcedure,
            AH.lpaCode                                  AS lpaCode,
            AH.caseOfficerId                            AS caseOfficerId,
            AH.inspectorId                              AS inspectorId,
            AH.allocationLevel                          AS allocationLevel,
            CAST(AH.allocationBand AS NUMERIC)          AS allocationBand,
            AH.caseSpecialisms                          AS caseSpecialisms,
            AH.caseSubmittedDate                        AS caseSubmittedDate,
            AH.caseCreatedDate                          AS caseCreatedDate,
            AH.caseUpdatedDate                          AS caseUpdatedDate,
            AH.caseValidDate                            AS caseValidDate,
            AH.caseValidationDate                       AS caseValidationDate,
            AH.caseValidationOutcome                    AS caseValidationOutcome,
            AH.caseValidationInvalidDetails             AS caseValidationInvalidDetails,
            cast(AH.caseValidationIncompleteDetails as string)          AS caseValidationIncompleteDetails,
            AH.caseExtensionDate                        AS caseExtensionDate,
            AH.caseStartedDate                          AS caseStartedDate,
            AH.casePublishedDate                        AS casePublishedDate,
            AH.linkedCaseStatus                         AS linkedCaseStatus,
            AH.leadCaseReference                        AS leadCaseReference,
            AH.lpaQuestionnaireDueDate                  AS lpaQuestionnaireDueDate,
            AH.lpaQuestionnaireSubmittedDate            AS lpaQuestionnaireSubmittedDate,
            AH.lpaQuestionnaireCreatedDate              AS lpaQuestionnaireCreatedDate,
            AH.lpaQuestionnairePublishedDate            AS lpaQuestionnairePublishedDate,
            AH.lpaQuestionnaireValidationOutcome        AS lpaQuestionnaireValidationOutcome,
            AH.lpaQuestionnaireValidationOutcomeDate    AS lpaQuestionnaireValidationOutcomeDate,
            cast(AH.lpaQuestionnaireValidationDetails as string)        AS lpaQuestionnaireValidationDetails,
            AH.caseWithdrawnDate                        AS caseWithdrawnDate,
            AH.caseTransferredDate                      AS caseTransferredDate,
            AH.transferredCaseClosedDate                AS transferredCaseClosedDate,
            AH.caseDecisionOutcomeDate                  AS caseDecisionOutcomeDate,
            AH.caseDecisionPublishedDate                AS caseDecisionPublishedDate,
            AH.caseDecisionOutcome                      AS caseDecisionOutcome,
            AH.caseCompletedDate                        AS caseCompletedDate,
            CAST(AH.enforcementNotice AS BOOLEAN)       AS enforcementNotice,
            AH.applicationReference                     AS applicationReference,
            AH.applicationDate                          AS applicationDate,
            AH.applicationDecision                      AS applicationDecision,
            AH.applicationDecisionDate                  AS applicationDecisionDate,
            AH.caseSubmissionDueDate                    AS caseSubmissionDueDate,
            AH.siteAddressLine1                         AS siteAddressLine1,
            AH.siteAddressLine2                         AS siteAddressLine2,
            AH.siteAddressTown                          AS siteAddressTown,
            AH.siteAddressCounty                        AS siteAddressCounty,
            AH.siteAddressPostcode                      AS siteAddressPostcode,
            cast(AH.siteAccessDetails as string)                       AS siteAccessDetails,
            AH.siteSafetyDetails                        AS siteSafetyDetails,
            CAST(AH.siteAreaSquareMetres AS BOOLEAN)    AS siteAreaSquareMetres,
            CAST(AH.floorSpaceSquareMetres AS NUMERIC)  AS floorSpaceSquareMetres,
            CAST(AH.isCorrectAppealType AS BOOLEAN)     AS isCorrectAppealType,
            CAST(AH.isGreenBelt AS BOOLEAN)             AS isGreenBelt,
            CAST(AH.inConservationArea AS BOOLEAN)      AS inConservationArea,
            CAST(AH.ownsAllLand AS BOOLEAN)             AS ownsAllLand,
            CAST(AH.ownsSomeLand AS BOOLEAN)            AS ownsSomeLand,
            AH.knowsOtherOwners                         AS knowsOtherOwners,
            AH.knowsAllOwners                           AS knowsAllOwners,
            CAST(AH.advertisedAppeal AS BOOLEAN)        AS advertisedAppeal,
            cast(AH.notificationMethod as string)       AS notificationMethod,
            CAST(AH.ownersInformed AS BOOLEAN)          AS ownersInformed,
            AH.originalDevelopmentDescription           AS originalDevelopmentDescription,
            CAST(AH.changedDevelopmentDescription       AS BOOLEAN) AS changedDevelopmentDescription,
            AH.newConditionDetails                      AS newConditionDetails,
            AH.nearbyCaseReferences                     AS nearbyCaseReferences,
            CAST(AH.neighbouringSiteAddresses AS STRING) AS neighbouringSiteAddresses,
            AH.affectedListedBuildingNumbers            AS affectedListedBuildingNumbers,
            CAST(AH.appellantCostsAppliedFor AS BOOLEAN) AS appellantCostsAppliedFor,
            CAST(AH.lpaCostsAppliedFor AS BOOLEAN)       AS lpaCostsAppliedFor,
            AH.typeOfPlanningApplication                 AS typeOfPlanningApplication,
            AH.hasLandownersPermission                   AS hasLandownersPermission,
            AH.wasApplicationRefusedDueToHighwayOrTraffic AS wasApplicationRefusedDueToHighwayOrTraffic,
            AH.didAppellantSubmitCompletePhotosAndPlans AS didAppellantSubmitCompletePhotosAndPlans,
            AH.isSiteInAreaOfSpecialControlAdverts      AS isSiteInAreaOfSpecialControlAdverts,
            AH.advertDetails                            AS advertDetails,
            AH.padsSapId                                AS padsSapId,
            AH.applicationDecisionDueDate               AS applicationDecisionDueDate,
            AH.IngestionDate                             AS IngestionDate,
            AH.ValidTo                                   AS ValidTo,
            AH.IsActive                                  AS IsActive
        FROM odw_harmonised_db.appeal_has AS AH 
        WHERE AH.lpaCode NOT in ('Q9999', 'Q1111') and AH.caseReference > '6000000' and AH.caseReference!='6005241' and AH.ODTSourceSystem='ODT'
          AND (caseSubmittedDate IS NULL OR caseSubmittedDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (caseCreatedDate IS NULL OR caseCreatedDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (caseUpdatedDate IS NULL OR caseUpdatedDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (caseValidDate IS NULL OR caseValidDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (caseValidationDate IS NULL OR caseValidationDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (caseExtensionDate IS NULL OR caseExtensionDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (caseStartedDate IS NULL OR caseStartedDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (casePublishedDate IS NULL OR casePublishedDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (lpaQuestionnaireDueDate IS NULL OR lpaQuestionnaireDueDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (lpaQuestionnaireSubmittedDate IS NULL OR lpaQuestionnaireSubmittedDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (lpaQuestionnaireCreatedDate IS NULL OR lpaQuestionnaireCreatedDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (lpaQuestionnairePublishedDate IS NULL OR lpaQuestionnairePublishedDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (lpaQuestionnaireValidationOutcomeDate IS NULL OR lpaQuestionnaireValidationOutcomeDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (caseWithdrawnDate IS NULL OR caseWithdrawnDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (caseTransferredDate IS NULL OR caseTransferredDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (transferredCaseClosedDate IS NULL OR transferredCaseClosedDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (caseDecisionOutcomeDate IS NULL OR caseDecisionOutcomeDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (caseDecisionPublishedDate IS NULL OR caseDecisionPublishedDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (caseCompletedDate IS NULL OR caseCompletedDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (applicationDate IS NULL OR applicationDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (applicationDecisionDate IS NULL OR applicationDecisionDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (caseSubmissionDueDate IS NULL OR caseSubmissionDueDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (applicationDecisionDueDate IS NULL OR applicationDecisionDueDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
          AND (IngestionDate IS NULL OR IngestionDate >= TIMESTAMP('1900-01-01'))
    """)

except Exception as e:
    error_message = f"Error is sql query for odw_harmonised_db.appeal_has: {str(e)[:800]}"
    end_exec_time=datetime.now()

if not error_message:
    try:
        timestamp_columns = [
            'caseValidDate',
            'caseSubmittedDate',
            'caseCreatedDate',
            'caseUpdatedDate',
            'caseValidationDate',
            'caseExtensionDate',
            'caseStartedDate',
            'casePublishedDate',
            'lpaQuestionnaireDueDate',
            'lpaQuestionnaireSubmittedDate',
            'lpaQuestionnaireCreatedDate',
            'lpaQuestionnairePublishedDate',
            'lpaQuestionnaireValidationOutcomeDate',
            'caseWithdrawnDate',
            'caseTransferredDate',
            'transferredCaseClosedDate',
            'caseDecisionOutcomeDate',
            'caseDecisionPublishedDate',
            'caseCompletedDate',
            'applicationDecisionDate',
            'caseSubmissionDueDate',
            'applicationDecisionDueDate',
            'IngestionDate',
            'ValidTo'
        ]

        # Apply the UTC to London conversion for each column
        final_view_df = view_df
        for column_name in timestamp_columns:
            final_view_df = final_view_df.withColumn(column_name, F.to_timestamp(F.from_utc_timestamp(F.col(column_name), 'Europe/London'), "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS"))

    except Exception as e:
        error_message = f"Error in timestamp conversion: {str(e)[:800]}"
        end_exec_time=datetime.now()
        print(error_message)

try:
    table_name = 'odw_curated_db.appeals_has_curated_mipins'

    df_table_path = spark.sql(f"DESCRIBE EXTENDED {table_name}")
    table_path = (
        df_table_path
        .where("col_name == 'Location'")
        .select("data_type")
        .collect()[0][0]
    )

    final_view_df.write \
        .format("parquet") \
        .mode("overwrite") \
        .option("path", table_path) \
        .saveAsTable(table_name)
    end_exec_time=datetime.now()    

except Exceptionas as e:
    error_message = f"Error writing table {table_name}: {str(e)[:800]}"
    end_exec_time=datetime.now()
    print(error_message)

duration_seconds = (end_exec_time - start_exec_time).total_seconds()
activity_type = f"{mssparkutils.runtime.context['currentNotebookName']} Notebook"
stage = "Success" if not error_message else "Failed"
status_message = (
    f"Successfully loaded data into {table_name} table"
    if not error_message
    else f"Failed to load data from {table_name} table"
)
status_code = "200" if stage == "Success" else "500"
print(status_message)

log_telemetry_and_exit(
    stage,
    start_exec_time,
    end_exec_time,
    error_message,
    table_name,
    insert_count,
    update_count,
    delete_count,
    PipelineName,
    PipelineRunID,
    PipelineTriggerID,
    PipelineTriggerName,
    PipelineTriggerType,
    PipelineTriggeredbyPipelineName,
    PipelineTriggeredbyPipelineRunID,
    activity_type,
    duration_seconds,
    status_message,
    status_code

#%%sql
#select * from odw_curated_db.appeals_has_curated_mipins 
#SELECT COUNT(1) FROM odw_curated_db.appeals_has_curated_mipins
#select hasLandownersPermission,wasApplicationRefusedDueToHighwayOrTraffic,didAppellantSubmitCompletePhotosAndPlans,
#isSiteInAreaOfSpecialControlAdverts,advertDetails from odw_curated_db.appeals_has_curated_mipins
